fallback: Used book2skill plus skill-creator-style distillation because this runtime has no local cangjie skill available.

qualityChecks: SKILL.md is self-contained and does not require reading source notes for execution.
Runtime execution does not depend on external files, webpages, source reports, original books, external source folders, or cross-skill material.
Trigger, non-trigger, standalone contract, activation gate, workflow, deliverables, recovery, idempotency, boundaries, and hard rules are explicit.
test-prompts.json contains should_trigger, should_not_trigger, edge_cases, and compliance_expectations.
sourceFiles preserved as provenance only, not runtime dependency.
closureReview.remainingRisk: Domain compensation semantics still need user- or system-specific legal, financial, and operational validation.

runtimeDependencyPolicy: Closed skill: execute from SKILL.md; use references/source-notes.md only as local optional provenance; do not require external source folders, webpages, original books, source reports, machine-local paths, or cross-skill files.
